 {'date': '2026-03-13 22:12:27',
  'headline': 'How The American Woodmark (AMWD) Story Is Shifting Around The '
              'MasterBrand Deal And Valuation',
  'publisher': 'Simply Wall St.',
  'summary': 'The updated fair value estimate for American Woodmark has '
             'shifted to US$59 from US$66, an 11% adjustment that pulls it '
             'closer to where recent analyst price targets have been '
             'clustering. This move lines up with a set of Neutral ratings and '

             'track these changing targets and interpret what they might mean '
             'for the...',
  'url': 'https://finance.yahoo.com/news/american-woodmark-amwd-story-shifting-221227899.html'},
 {'date': '2026-03-13 11:56:39',
  'headline': '1 Profitable Stock for Long-Term Investors and 2 We Turn Down',

  'headline': 'Titan International, American Woodmark, RXO, JELD-WEN, and LGI '

  'summary': 'A number of stocks fell in the morning session after oil prices '

 {'date': '2026-02-26 20:56:18',
  'headline': 'American Woodmark (NASDAQ:AMWD) Reports Sales Below Analyst '
              'Estimates In Q4 CY2025 Earnings',
  'publisher': 'StockStory',
  'summary': 'Cabinet manufacturing company American Woodmark (NASDAQ:AMWD) '
             'missed Wall Street’s revenue expectations in Q4 CY2025, with '
             'sales falling 18.4% year on year to $324.3 million. Its non-GAAP '
             'profit of $0.45 per share was significantly above analysts’ '
             'consensus estimates.',
  'url': 'https://finance.yahoo.com/news/american-woodmark-nasdaq-amwd-reports-205618450.html'},
 {'date': '2026-02-26 11:40:28',
  'headline': 'American Woodmark: Fiscal Q3 Earnings Snapshot',
  'publisher': 'Associated Press Finance',
  'summary': 'AMWD) on Thursday reported a fiscal third-quarter loss of $28.7 '
             'million, after reporting a profit in the same period a year '
             'earlier. The Winchester, Virginia-based company said it had a '
             'loss of $1.97 per share. Earnings, adjusted for one-time gains '
             'and costs, were 45 cents per share.',
  'url': 'https://finance.yahoo.com/news/american-woodmark-fiscal-q3-earnings-114028105.html'},
 {'date': '2026-02-25 21:09:08',
  'headline': 'How The MasterBrand Deal Is Reframing The Story For American '
              'Woodmark (AMWD)',
  'publisher': 'Simply Wall St.',
  'summary': 'The latest update keeps American Woodmark’s fair value estimate '
             'at US$66.0, aligning with the prior US$66 view and indicating no '

             'smoothly, while others question how much upside remains until '
             'integration results are clearer. As you read on, you will see...',
  'url': 'https://finance.yahoo.com/news/masterbrand-deal-reframing-story-american-210908447.html'},
